data.body:
It does have a dampening effect on capital. It is a relative subsidy for labor (cash) and a tax on capital (rights to future productivity). 

It’s not a free lunch, but stagfever (deflation and full employment) is both possible and desirable.

We just have to let it happen by getting out of the way.
